_comment: Copy to identity-denylist.json (gitignored) and fill in site-specific identity terms. The redaction module loads the real file via --identity-file or $SECURITY_STACK_IDENTITY_FILE. Do NOT commit the filled-in version. Generic patterns (home paths, secrets, phones, chat ids) are already built in; this file is only for literal names/usernames/exact ids that generic rules cannot infer.
